title: [Skyship, Research]
description: Numerous tall glaes cylinders dot the area, towering over the dim, narrow passageways between them like a dense grove.  These cylinders are dyed an opaque, chalky white and each is underlit at its base by a series of orbs emitting an ethereal blue glow.  While it is difficult to precisely determine the contents at a casual glance, each cylinder appears to be completely filled with a cloudy liquid containing the silhouette of a humanoid figure.
paths: Obvious exits: north, east, south, west
